title: ochna pisiformis
intro: Ochna pisiformis, also known as the Mickey Mouse plant, is a small, deciduous shrub native to southern Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ochna pisiformis include its ability to treat a range of ailments, including fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant and anti-cancer agent. Herbal preparations of Ochna pisiformis can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are commonly used in traditional medicine practices in southern Africa.
